lede.en: Connect the control board's stepper driver outputs to the motors. Wire the solenoid to the spindle output, and ground it.
lede.zh: 把控制板的步进驱动接口接到电机；电磁铁接到主轴（Spindle）接口，再接地。

body.en: Never plug in or remove a driver while the board is powered.
body.zh: 板子通电时，切勿插拔驱动。

body.en: Match each driver's pin labels to the board silkscreen before pressing it home — a reversed TMC2209 can burn out on power-up.
body.zh: 压到位之前，先让每个驱动的引脚标识对准板上丝印——TMC2209 装反，一上电就可能烧坏。

body.en: Colored to colored, black to black.
body.zh: 彩色引脚对彩色引脚，黑色引脚对黑色引脚。

body.en: TMC2209 driver modules typically include a heatsink that can be stuck onto the top of the driver chip.
body.zh: TMC2209 驱动模块通常自带散热片，可贴在驱动芯片顶部。

labels.style: position:absolute; left:25mm; top:72mm; font-size:10pt; font-weight:400; color:var(--accent); z-index:2;
position:absolute; left:50mm; top:69mm; font-size:10pt; font-weight:400; color:var(--accent); z-index:2;
position:absolute; left:18mm; top:118mm; font-size:10pt; font-weight:400; color:var(--accent); z-index:2;
position:absolute; left:60mm; top:140mm; font-size:10pt; font-weight:400; color:var(--accent); z-index:2;
position:absolute; left:90mm; top:138mm; font-size:10pt; font-weight:400; color:var(--accent); z-index:2;
position:absolute; right:90mm; top:30mm; font-size:10pt; font-weight:400; color:var(--accent); z-index:2;
position:absolute; right:60mm; top:30mm; font-size:10pt; font-weight:400; color:var(--accent); z-index:2;

body.en: The board uses standard GRBL axis outputs, remapped as follows: the X-axis motor driver drives Motor B, the Y1-axis motor driver drives Motor A, and the Spindle output drives the solenoid (in place of a spindle).
body.zh: 控制板用标准 GRBL 轴输出，按下面这样重新映射：X 轴驱动器接电机 B，Y1 轴驱动器接电机 A，主轴 (Spindle) 输出接电磁铁（代替主轴）。

body.en: The Spindle output (to the solenoid) is not polarity-sensitive — either lead can go to either terminal.
body.zh: 主轴 (Spindle) 输出（接电磁铁）不分极性，两根线接哪个端子都行。

body.en: The solenoid's stock leads don't reach the control board. Splice extra hookup wire onto both the 12 V and GND leads.
body.zh: 电磁铁原装引线够不到控制板，给 12V 和 GND 两根引线各接长一段导线。

body.en: Solder each joint and cover it with heat-shrink. Offset the two splices about 20 mm so the insulated joints don't sit side by side.
body.zh: 每个接头先焊接，再套热缩管。把两个接头错开约 20 mm，别让它们并排挤在一起。

body.en: The stylus rides on the solenoid's iron core, so grounding the core grounds the tip. Give it a real ground reference — do not use the control board's GND.
body.zh: 触控笔装在电磁铁铁芯上，铁芯接地，笔尖就跟着接地。要找一个真正的接地参考，别用控制板的 GND。

body.en: A capacitive screen senses a tap through your body's ground reference. A robot-held stylus floats electrically and lacks that reference, so taps register unreliably. Grounding the stylus stands in for the human hand and steadies the touch signal.
body.zh: 电容屏靠人体的接地参考感应触摸。机械臂握着的触控笔电气上是浮空的，缺这个参考，点击就不稳。给触控笔接地，相当于替人手补上参考，触摸信号就稳了。

body.en: Connect the core to the power supply's common ground. The simplest option is to clip the wire to bare metal on a desktop PC chassis that is grounded through a three-prong outlet — it reaches earth through the mains, giving a stable reference.
body.zh: 把铁芯接到电源的公共地。最简单的办法是找一台用三脚插座可靠接地的台式电脑，把线夹在机箱裸露的金属上。机箱经市电连到大地，能提供稳定的接地参考。

body.en: Three wires run from the solenoid — positive (+), negative (−), and ground. Route all three up along the Teflon tube to above the control board holder, then connect + and − to the control board's Spindle terminal and the ground wire to the power supply's common ground.
body.zh: 电磁铁引出三根线：正极（+）、负极（−）和接地线。把三根线一起沿特氟龙管穿到控制板支架上方，再把正、负极接到控制板的主轴 (Spindle) 端子，接地线接到电源的公共地。

body.en: Never put the ground wire into a wall socket. Mains voltage (220 V/110 V) is lethal — touching the live terminal instead of earth can cause a fatal shock and instantly destroy your phone and equipment. Connect only to a verified ground point.
body.zh: 切勿把接地线插进墙壁插座。市电电压（220V/110V）足以致命：万一接到火线而不是地线，可能造成致命电击，瞬间烧毁手机和设备。只能接到确认可靠的接地点。
